textPlain: I suggest looking at the https://publicdomainreview.org/ for a more comprehensive listings,and this one for books:https://standardebooks.org/blog/public-domain-day-2026
Imagine how much better the world would be if the copyright term was shorter and/or if past a certain point, registration (and payment of fee) was needed to renew copyright and use the full term.
In an equitable world, LLMs would only provide answers from <=1930 data (as of 1 January).Yet another argument for copyright being far too long.
Related:What will enter the public domain in 2026?https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=46117112
